metadata.description: Skills, commands, and plugins for architects, designers, and AEC professionals — site research, zoning, programming, specifications, materials research, presentations, and building-code analysis.

plugins.name: 00-due-diligence
plugins.description: NYC property due diligence — landmarks, DOB permits, violations, ACRIS records, HPD, and BSA variances from NYC Open Data.

plugins.name: 01-site-planning
plugins.description: Site planning skills — environmental analysis, mobility, demographics, and history.

plugins.name: 02-zoning-analysis
plugins.description: Zoning analysis skills — buildable envelope calculations for New York City.

plugins.name: 03-programming
plugins.description: Architectural programming skills — occupancy load calculations (IBC) and workplace space programming.

plugins.name: 04-specifications
plugins.description: Construction specification skills — CSI MasterFormat spec writing.

plugins.name: 05-sustainability
plugins.description: Sustainability skills — EPD parsing, research, comparison, and CSI specification with GWP thresholds.

plugins.name: 06-materials-research
plugins.description: Product and materials research skills — FF&E product search, spec extraction, cleanup, PDF parsing, and image processing.

plugins.name: 07-presentations
plugins.description: Presentation skills — HTML slide deck generation and color palette creation.

plugins.name: 08-dispatcher
plugins.description: Smart router and help menu — describe a task and get routed to the right agent or skill.

plugins.name: 09-project-dossier
plugins.description: Project dossier and decision records — persistent per-project facts (PROJECT.md, with a YAML front-matter machine contract read by Norma and other skills) and ADR-style decision capture (decisions/).

plugins.name: 10-norma
plugins.description: Norma building-code analysis — code Q&A, occupant load & egress, allowable height/area, cross-jurisdiction compare, and life-safety drawing review, grounded in a local code corpus and cited verbatim via the editable-install `norma` engine.
